title: Plocama calcicola
taxonomy: Plocama calcicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the Canary Islands. The classification of Plocama calcicola is within the genus Plocama, which is a group of plants that are commonly found in Mediterranean regions. This species is part of the larger plant kingdom known as Angiosperms, or flowering plants. Plocama calcicola is also classified as a member of the subclass Rosidae, within the larger class of Magnoliopsida.
